expectations.text: Output does NOT generate fake audit blocks (no 'Переформулировано:' / 'Найдено проблем:' on empty input)
expectations.evidence: No audit headers anywhere in output

expectations.text: Output includes at least 1 example invocation
expectations.evidence: Lines 6-7: '- /answer-simple Готово. Обновил FR-12.' and '- /answer-simple Wave 14 vs Wave 11 — Keep / Swap?'
